SQLLite.SQL: SELECT DISTINCT decode(du.forenames, null, 'EMPTY', du.forenames) as "Forenames", du.surname as "Surname", du.user_id as "UserId" FROM dca_user du, user_court uc, user_role ur WHERE uc.court_code = ${param.courtId} AND uc.home_flag = 'Y' AND du.user_id = uc.user_id AND uc.user_id = ur.user_id AND uc.court_code = ur.court_code

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper cpSuper edsAdmin admin ccbcMan ccbcUser ccbcSGB2 ccbcTape
